subject: [PATCH v3 06/10] fuse: use named constants for io-uring iovec indices

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch replaces magic indices 0 and 1 in the iovec array with named constants FUSE_URING_IOV_HEADERS and FUSE_URING_IOV_PAYLOAD, making the code self-documenting and preparing for future buffer ring support. The patch modifies several functions in the fuse module to use these new constants instead of hardcoded indices. This change improves code readability and maintainability by eliminating magic numbers and making it easier to understand the purpose of each index.
